title: Schnella caudigera
taxonomy: Schnella caudigera is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the Gesneriaceae family, Schnella caudigera is classified in the tribe Gesnerieae. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and genetic similarities with other species in the family. Schnella caudigera is further classified in the genus Schnella, which is a group of flowering plants that are closely related to other genera in the Gesneriaceae family.
